mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_order_timeout_close_fail (order_id, user_id, voucher_id, fail_count, max_fail_count, last_fail_reason, status, next_retry_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{voucherId}, 1, #{maxFailCount}, #{failReason}, CASE WHEN #{maxFailCount} <= 1 THEN 'NEED_MANUAL' ELSE 'INIT' END, #{nextRetryTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), voucher_id = VALUES(voucher_id), fail_count = fail_count + 1, max_fail_count = VALUES(max_fail_count), last_fail_reason = VALUES(last_fail_reason), status = CASE WHEN fail_count + 1 >= VALUES(max_fail_count) THEN 'NEED_MANUAL' ELSE 'INIT' END, next_retry_time = VALUES(next_retry_time)
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, user_id, voucher_id, fail_count, max_fail_count, last_fail_reason, status, next_retry_time, create_time, update_time FROM tb_order_timeout_close_fail WHERE status = 'INIT' AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= #{now}) ORDER BY update_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_order_timeout_close_fail SET fail_count = fail_count + 1, last_fail_reason = #{failReason}, status = CASE WHEN fail_count + 1 >= max_fail_count THEN 'NEED_MANUAL' ELSE 'INIT' END, next_retry_time = CASE WHEN fail_count + 1 >= max_fail_count THEN NULL ELSE #{nextRetryTime} END WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING' AND fail_count = #{expectedFailCount}

UPDATE tb_order_timeout_close_fail SET status = 'INIT', next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, last_fail_reason = 'ORDER_CLOSE_RETRY_PROCESSING_TIMEOUT' WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND update_time <= #{staleBefore} ORDER BY update_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
